title: Perplexity AI Cheat Sheet
description: Quick reference for using Perplexity AI for everyday tasks.

commands.description: Provides a concise summary of a given article.
commands.scenario: When you need a quick overview of a lengthy article.

commands.description: Gives a simple explanation of a complex concept.
commands.scenario: When you encounter a difficult topic and need clarification.

commands.description: Extracts and lists the main points from a text.
commands.scenario: When you want to capture the essential points from a document.

commands.description: Rephrases text to make it easier to understand.
commands.scenario: When an email or document is too complex.

commands.command: Generate ideas for a blog post
commands.description: Provides brainstorming ideas for writing a blog post.
commands.scenario: When you're stuck and need inspiration for writing.

commands.description: Locates articles related to a given topic or article.
commands.scenario: When you need more information on a topic.

commands.description: Translates text from one language to another.
commands.scenario: When you need to understand text in a different language.

commands.command: Create a summary in bullet points
commands.description: Generates a bullet-point summary of a text.
commands.scenario: When you need a structured summary of information.

commands.description: Verifies the accuracy of information in a text.
commands.scenario: When you need to ensure the reliability of information.

commands.command: Find the author of this article
commands.description: Identifies the author of a given article.
commands.scenario: When you want to know who wrote an article.

commands.description: Offers suggestions to enhance the quality of a text.
commands.scenario: When you want to improve the clarity or impact of your writing.

commands.command: Identify the tone of this text
commands.description: Analyzes and describes the tone of a text.
commands.scenario: When you need to understand the emotional tone of communication.

commands.description: Searches for relevant statistics about a specific topic.
commands.scenario: When you need data to support your research or argument.

commands.command: Compare [Topic A] and [Topic B] in a table format
commands.description: Asks Perplexity to create a side-by-side comparison of two different subjects, making it easy to see pros, cons, or differences visually.

commands.command: Find the most recent news about [Topic] from the last 24 hours
commands.description: Leverages Perplexity's real-time web searching to filter for extremely current events rather than general knowledge.

commands.command: Provide a step-by-step guide on how to [Task]
commands.description: Instructs the AI to break down a complex process into actionable, sequential instructions based on current web tutorials.

commands.command: Give me a list of pros and cons for [Product/Decision]
commands.description: Forces the AI to provide a balanced perspective on a specific purchase or decision, helping with critical thinking.

commands.command: Recommend [Product Category] based on these specific criteria: [Criteria]
commands.description: Uses Perplexity as a personalized shopping assistant by filtering search results through your specific needs and constraints.
